name: Hearty Tuna Melts
recipeIngredient: 6 1/8 ounces Tuna, water pack, drained and flaked
6 slices Fat-free pasteurized cheese, process cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine tuna, mayonnaise, celery, green pepper, olives, and thyme in a bowl and mix lightly.
3. For each sandwich, spread 1/4 cup of the tuna mixture on a bread slice.
4. Place a slice of cheese on top of the tuna mixture.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or broil until the cheese melts.
6. Yield: 6 sandwiches, each containing 139 calories, 13g protein, 18g carbohydrates, 2g fat, and 17mg cholesterol, 637mg sodium.
